name: Confetti Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the lemon juice, cider vinegar, and salt in a non-reactive bowl.
2. Peel one apple and grate it into the bowl using the large holes of the grater for shreds rather than pulp. Discard the core.
3. Stir the grated apple shreds to coat them with the dressing to prevent browning, then repeat with the remaining apples.
4. Toss the shredded carrots, finely chopped red pepper, and minced scallion greens into the salad.
5. The salad may clump, so use a large fork for tossing to ensure even distribution of ingredients.
6. Let the salad sit for 10 minutes or longer to allow flavors to develop.
7. Taste and add sugar as desired; the amount needed will vary depending on the natural sweetness of the carrots and apples used.
